title: Terms & Conditions
description: Please read these terms carefully before using Pilot to learn car driving or book any lessons.

sections.title: 1. About Pilot
body: Pilot is a platform that connects learners with professional driving instructors for on-road training and license preparation.
We provide tools to help you schedule lessons, track your progress, and learn car driving in a structured, safe way.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
body: You must hold a valid learner’s licence or permit, as required by your local transport authority, before taking on-road lessons.
You are responsible for ensuring that the information you provide (age, identity, contact details) is accurate and up to date.

sections.title: 3. Bookings and Cancellations
body: Lessons are booked through the Pilot app or website with your preferred instructor, vehicle type, and time slot.
To reschedule or cancel a lesson, you must do so within the notice period shown at the time of booking. Late cancellations or no‑shows may be charged in full.
In rare cases an instructor may need to reschedule due to vehicle issues, weather, or emergencies. We will notify you as early as possible and arrange an alternate slot.

sections.title: 4. Payments and Refunds
body: Lesson fees and package prices are displayed before you confirm a booking. Taxes and government fees for licence processing may be charged separately.
Payments are processed securely by our payment partners. Pilot does not store your full card details.
Refunds, where applicable, are processed back to your original payment method in line with our cancellation policy and any promotional terms.

sections.title: 5. Your Responsibilities During Lessons
body: You agree to follow all road rules and the instructions of your instructor at all times during the lesson.
You must not attend a lesson under the influence of alcohol, drugs, or any substance that may impair your driving.
You must inform your instructor of any medical condition that could affect your ability to drive safely.

sections.title: 6. Safety and Vehicles
body: Instructors teaching through Pilot are expected to use roadworthy vehicles with dual controls (where applicable) and valid insurance.
Despite all precautions, learning to drive involves inherent risks. By booking lessons, you accept those risks and agree that you are responsible for following safety instructions.

sections.title: 7. Use of the App
body: You agree not to misuse the Pilot platform, including attempting to interfere with security features, reverse engineering, or using the app for any unlawful purpose.
Account credentials must be kept confidential. You are responsible for activity that occurs under your account.

sections.title: 8. Content and Intellectual Property
body: All branding, course content, lesson plans, and learning material made available through Pilot are protected by intellectual property laws.
You may use this content only for your personal learning journey and may not copy, resell, or distribute it without written permission.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Pilot is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including loss of time, test fees, or use of your own vehicle.
Nothing in these terms limits any rights you have under mandatory consumer protection laws in your country.

sections.title: 10. Changes to These Terms
body: We may update these terms occasionally to reflect changes in our services, pricing, or legal requirements.
When we make material changes, we will notify you in the app or via email and indicate the date from which the new terms apply.

sections.title: 11. Contact
body: For questions about these terms, lesson bookings, or learning car driving with Pilot, you can reach us at help@withpilot.com.
